text.title: Ads Conversion Tracking Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: implement CAPI / enhanced first; never run browser-only
add event_id to both sides before any go-live

branch.when: crm_source_of_truth == 'present' AND server_side == 'present' AND dedup_key == 'present' AND window_matches_cycle == false
crm_source_of_truth == 'present' AND server_side == 'present' AND dedup_key == 'present' AND window_matches_cycle == true

conclusion.verdict: verify DebugView + CRM cross-check; then go live

example.trace: crm_source_of_truth == 'present' AND server_side == 'present' AND dedup_key == 'present' AND window_matches_cycle == true → conclusion ref="verification-before-spend" verdict="verify DebugView + CRM cross-check; then go live"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
